name: pagination
title: Pagination
description: Fluent 2-styled pagination with shadcn APIs. Seven composable parts (Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis), page links styled via buttonVariants (outline when active, ghost otherwise).
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
